title: Build Cache Reliability — Happy Path: Unchanged Targets Achieve 80% Cache Hit Rate
given: An engineer runs a CI build for a PR that modifies 2 files in the payments service, while 150 build targets for unchanged dependencies (shared libraries, proto definitions, common utilities) have cached artifacts from the last successful build
when: The build system requests cached artifacts from the remote Bazel cache for the 150 unchanged targets
then: At least 120 of the 150 requests (80%) return a cache hit, each cache response is delivered in under 500ms, and the build log shows cache hit/miss statistics per target group
